footer.tagline: AI-powered business automation for the Microsoft ecosystem.

welcome.title: Welcome to MyWorkMate
welcome.content: Your AI-powered business assistant. Let us give you a quick tour of the key features.

filesTab.title: Your Knowledge Base
filesTab.content: Upload documents here to give MyWorkMate recurring context. These files will be available across all your conversations.

connectionsTab.title: Cloud Connections
connectionsTab.content: Connect your OneDrive or SharePoint accounts to automatically sync your business documents.

agentSelector.title: Specialized Agents
agentSelector.content: Each agent is an expert in a different area. Choose the one that best fits your question.

orchestratorDefault.title: Orchestrator — Recommended
orchestratorDefault.content: The Orchestrator automatically routes your questions to the best agent. We recommend keeping it as your default.

webSearchAttachments.title: Web Search & Attachments
webSearchAttachments.content: Enable web search with the Globe icon for up-to-date information, or attach temporary files with the Paperclip for single-session context.

done.title: You're All Set!
done.content: Start chatting to explore what MyWorkMate can do for your business. You can always revisit this tour from Settings.

fileExplorer.title: Your Synced Documents
fileExplorer.content: Connected documents appear here. Use the source filter to browse by OneDrive or SharePoint.

documentTypes.title: Organized by Type
documentTypes.content: Files are automatically categorized and processed so MyWorkMate can search and reference them in conversations.

newChat.title: Pro Tip: Keep Context Clean
newChat.content: Start a new chat for different topics — it helps MyWorkMate stay focused and accurate.

useAsContext.title: Pro Tip: Use Files as Context
useAsContext.content: Drag files from the panel into the chat, or right-click any file and select "Use as Context" to reference it.

atMention.title: Pro Tip: Quick File Reference
atMention.content: Type @ in the chat input to instantly search and reference your files.

toggleColumns.title: Pro Tip: Customize Your View
toggleColumns.content: Click here to show or hide table columns and tailor the file view to your needs.

tableResize.title: Pro Tip: Resize & Reorder Columns
tableResize.content: Drag column edges to resize, or drag column headers to reorder them.

refreshSync.title: Pro Tip: Refresh Sync
refreshSync.content: Hit refresh to check for pending sync updates and re-verify your cloud connections.

voiceInput.title: Pro Tip: Use Voice Input
voiceInput.content: Tap the microphone to dictate longer, more detailed messages — richer context means better results.
